> Template — seeds stub nodes for agile ceremony and ritual patterns.
> Each ## section → one ChromaDB node. Universal scope.

## Sprint Planning
### Scope
_Stub — goal-setting and task breakdown for the upcoming sprint._
### Checklist
_Stub — pre-planning inputs, capacity calculation, goal statement, backlog selection._
### Pass Criteria
_Stub — sprint goal agreed; backlog items estimated and committed._

## Sprint Review
### Scope
_Stub — demonstrate completed work to stakeholders; gather feedback._
### Checklist
_Stub — demo script, acceptance sign-off, feedback capture._
### Pass Criteria
_Stub — all done items demoed; stakeholder feedback recorded._

## Sprint Retrospective
### Scope
_Stub — team reflection on process; identify improvements._
### Checklist
_Stub — what went well, what to improve, action items with owners._
### Pass Criteria
_Stub — at least one actionable improvement committed for next sprint._

## Daily Standup
### Scope
_Stub — 15-minute daily sync; surface blockers early._
### Checklist
_Stub — yesterday / today / blockers format; escalation path for blockers._
### Pass Criteria
_Stub — blockers identified and owner assigned; runs under 15 minutes._

## Backlog Refinement
### Scope
_Stub — groom and estimate upcoming backlog items before sprint planning._
### Checklist
_Stub — acceptance criteria written, dependencies mapped, items estimated._
### Pass Criteria
_Stub — top N items sprint-ready (DoR met)._

## Definition of Done
### Scope
_Stub — shared criteria every story must meet before marking done._
### Checklist
_Stub — code reviewed, tests passing, feature flagged if needed, documented, demoed._
### Pass Criteria
_Stub — all criteria met; no exceptions without team agreement._

## Definition of Ready
### Scope
_Stub — criteria a backlog item must meet before it can enter a sprint._
### Checklist
_Stub — acceptance criteria written, wireframes linked, dependencies identified, estimated._
### Pass Criteria
_Stub — all criteria met; PO sign-off._

## Story Pointing
### Scope
_Stub — relative effort estimation using Fibonacci or T-shirt sizing._
### Checklist
_Stub — reference stories, planning poker process, split signal (> 8 points)._
### Pass Criteria
_Stub — team consensus reached; outliers discussed._

## Team Norms
### Scope
_Stub — working agreements the team holds themselves to._
### Checklist
_Stub — communication channels, review turnaround SLA, meeting punctuality, escalation._
### Pass Criteria
_Stub — documented, visible, revisited each retrospective._
